task: Improve readability and naming only. Do not change outputs.
source_code:
def normalize_email(value):
    value = value.strip()
    value = value.lower()
    if "+" in value:
        local, domain = value.split("@")
        local = local.split("+")[0]
        value = local + "@" + domain
    return value
model_output_code:
def normalize_email(value):
    cleaned = value.strip().lower()
    if "+" not in cleaned:
        return cleaned
    local, domain = cleaned.split("@")
    local = local.split("+")[0]
    return f"{local}@{domain}"
refactoring_notes: Chaining strip().lower(). Early return per il caso senza alias. f-string invece di concatenazione. Logica invariata.

task: Refactor and clean up. Do not change outputs or edge-case behavior.
source_code:
class Slugifier
  def self.slugify(text)
    text = text.downcase.strip
    text = text.gsub(" ", "-")
    text = text.gsub(/[^a-z0-9\-]/, "")
    text
  end
end
tests:
require_relative "source"
require "minitest/autorun"

class SlugifierTest < Minitest::Test
  def test_basic
    assert_equal "hello-world", Slugifier.slugify("Hello World")
  end

  def test_strip
    assert_equal "hello", Slugifier.slugify("  Hello  ")
  end

  def test_symbols_removed
    assert_equal "hello-world", Slugifier.slugify("Hello @ World!")
  end
end
model_output_code:
class Slugifier
  def self.slugify(text)
    text.downcase.strip.gsub(" ", "-").gsub(/[^a-z0-9\-]/, "")
  end
end
refactoring_notes: Variabili intermedie eliminate, chiamate concatenate in pipeline. Operazioni nell'identico ordine — output invariato.

task: Refactor this function while preserving exact return values.
source_code:
<?php
function status_label($active, $verified) {
    if (!$active) {
        return "inactive";
    }
    if ($verified) {
        return "active_verified";
    }
    return "active_pending";
}
tests:
<?php
use PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase;

final class StatusLabelTest extends TestCase {
    public function testInactive() {
        $this->assertSame("inactive", status_label(false, false));
    }

    public function testVerified() {
        $this->assertSame("active_verified", status_label(true, true));
    }

    public function testPending() {
        $this->assertSame("active_pending", status_label(true, false));
    }
}
refactoring_notes: Rimosso blocco if per early return. Secondo ramo reso ternario. Mappa logica identica per tutti e 4 i valori booleani.

task: Optimize or rewrite this query, but the result set must remain the same.
source_code:
SELECT department, COUNT(*) AS total
FROM employees
WHERE active = 1
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY department;
tests:
-- Given employees:
-- (1, 'sales', 1), (2, 'sales', 0), (3, 'it', 1), (4, 'it', 1)
-- Expected result:
-- department | total
-- it         | 2
-- sales      | 1
model_output_code:
SELECT
    department,
    COUNT(*) AS total
FROM employees
WHERE active = 1
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY department;
refactoring_notes: Riformattazione verticale per leggibilità. Logica identica: stesso WHERE, GROUP BY, ORDER BY. Nessuna variazione semantica.
